nodes.label: P5.9 — synthesis + assembled-cell confirmation: the SCFF close-out verdict
nodes.rationale: Capstone decision record: the committed cell is SCFFContrastOverlap temp0.2/w2/L12/no-residual/fixed-reader; the two §7 verdicts (DEPTH-EARNED, READ-CHEAPLY-scoped) reported separately; SCFF is 'done, scoped'; hands off to Phase 6 (noise-hardening) with the S9 decision-record delta owed.

nodes.label: P5.9 verdict: the committed cell — SCFF is 'done, scoped'
nodes.rationale: Final cell: SCFFContrastOverlap, temp0.2, window 2, L12 bulk, NO residual, deployed with a fixed reader (truncation ~L2-3 on the continual home, all-tap for peak accuracy, w4 as the bounded depth-closer for compositional tasks); temp0.2/w2 is one config that ran every rung, so no independent-lever stacking needed re-confirmation; both continual-safe and natural-confirm gates cleared; the cheap brain is finished and trusted.

nodes.label: The S9 decision-record delta (owed to idea/main.ideas.v1.md)
nodes.rationale: Records readout as fixed-short-stack placement (revising S3's literal 'tap ALL layers' while keeping its intent), the adaptive exit struck, temp0.2/w2 adopted, no residual — committed when the author writes the public README/report.
